reports.status_summary: Red because schedule risk, budget risk are driving the highest weighted pressure.
reasons: Progress trails plan by 15 points and the project is 12 days behind schedule.
The project has consumed 84% of budget while delivering 60% completion.
The risk register contains 4 active items with a meaningful concentration of high and critical entries.
recommendations: Re-baseline overdue work and assign owners for the next two milestone dates.
Freeze non-essential spend until delivery progress catches up with the burn rate.
Convert critical risks into named mitigation actions with target resolution dates.
assumptions: Used the workbook's project summary row as the primary source of truth for current-state metrics.
Did not use the provided RAG column as an input; treated it only as an optional validation reference.
